items.topic_thesis: Epimetabolic Rate is the only scoreboard that really matters in periods of fast change.

items.topic_thesis: The Crossing is the protected threshold where truth can become common knowledge without social rupture.
items.angle: The interpretation is the point, not the quote itself.

items.topic_thesis: Waiting for organic trust in a fast-melt environment can be negligence dressed as virtue.
items.angle: Name the concept, explain it plainly, and show why it matters now.
items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking waiting for organic trust in a fast-melt environment can be negligence dressed as virtue.

items.topic_thesis: Trust burns faster than organizations know how to rebuild it.
items.angle: Name the misuse clearly and show the cost of getting it wrong.
items.hook: A practice can look rigorous and still make the system worse. trust burns faster than organizations know how to rebuild it.

items.topic_thesis: Tragic Postmortems should change identity, not just improve documentation.
items.angle: Start with a recurring problem and end with a usable move.
items.hook: If your team keeps repeating the same failure, stop adding process. tragic postmortems should change identity, not just improve documentation.
